description_long: This house features a classic gable roof with reddish-brown shingles and a prominent brick chimney on one side. The exterior walls are primarily white with scattered exposed brick patches, giving it a rustic, slightly weathered appearance. The structure includes a main rectangular section and a smaller side extension, both topped with matching tiled roofs. The front facade has a central arched doorway and two small windows, while the rear and sides show minimal fenestration. Wooden trim accents the roof edges and window frames, adding to the traditional look. The overall design suggests a cozy, single-family dwelling typical of suburban or rural neighborhoods.
description: A white house with a reddish-brown gable roof, brick chimney, and rustic exposed brick patches, featuring a main section and a smaller side extension.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the reddish-brown tiled roof, chimney, and the L-shaped layout of the house.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the chimney, roof tiles, and minimal window placement on the side extension.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the arched doorway, two small windows, and decorative wooden trim under the gable.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the side extension and exposed brick patches.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with no porch, simple trim, and no visible steps or columns.
